name: create-todo-item
query: Create Sources/TodoItem.swift with: (1) an enum TodoStatus: String, Codable with cases pending, inProgress, done; (2) a struct TodoItem: Codable, Identifiable with stored properties id: UUID (default UUID()), title: String, status: TodoStatus (default .pending), createdAt: Date (default Date()), dueAt: Date? (default nil); (3) a computed property isOverdue: Bool returning true when dueAt is non-nil and before Date() and status is not .done; (4) a method mark(as newStatus: TodoStatus) -> TodoItem returning a copy with the new status. Use import Foundation.
